Auto-Assignment Rules
Define rules to auto-suggest SEs when assigning visits
How it works: When you assign a visit, AIMS IQ checks these rules against the customer's territory and sector and auto-suggests the right SE — removing manual coordination.
Active Rules
Territory: Mumbai + Sector: Oil & Gas
→ Ravi Kumar
Active
Territory: Pune + Sector: Any
→ Priya Singh
Active
Budget: Over ₹50L → Senior SE only
→ Ravi Kumar
Active

→ Kavya Nair
